title: Potatoes for a Crowd
instructions:
Preheat the oven to 350°.
Grease a 13x9 inch pan.
Place the thawed hash browns into the prepared pan.
In a large bowl combine the stick of melted butter, sour cream, soup and cheese. Pour over the hash browns and spread evenly.
In a small bowl combine the corn flakes and the ½ stick of melted butter. Sprinkle over the top of the hash brown mixture.
Bake for 45-60 minutes or until heated through and golden.
